If they then go & log in, we\\n82:      * can send them to the welcome user (obviously this doesn't\\n83:      * guarantee they'll get a chat with the welcome user).\\n84:      *\\n85:      * @param {string} uid The user ID of the user we've just registered\\n86:      */\\n87:     setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void;\\n88: \\n89:     /**\\n90:      * Returns true if the current user has just been registered by this\\n91:      * client as determined by setJustRegisteredUserId()\\n92:      *\\n93:      * @returns {bool} True if user has just been registered\\n94:      */\\n95:     currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean;\\n96: \\n97:     /**\\n98:      * If the current user has been registered by this device then this\\n99:      * returns a boolean of whether it was within the last N hours given.\\n100:      */\\n101:     userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean;\\n102: \\n103:     /**\\n104:      * If the current user has been registered by this device then this\\n105:      * returns a boolean of whether it was after a given timestamp.\\n106:      */\\n107:     userRegisteredAfter(date: Date): boolean;\\n108: \\n109:     /**\\n110:      * Replace this MatrixClientPeg's client with a client instance that has\\n111:      * homeserver / identity server URLs and active credentials\\n112:      *\\n113:      * @param {IMatrixClientCreds} creds The new credentials to use.\\n114:      */\\n115:     replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void;\\n116: }\\n117: \\n118: /**\\n119:  * Wrapper object for handling the js-sdk Matrix Client object in the react-sdk\\n120:  * Handles the creation/initialisation of client objects.\\n121:  * This module provides a singleton instance of this class so the 'current'\\n122:  * Matrix Client object is available easily.\\n123:  */\\n124: class MatrixClientPegClass implements IMatrixClientPeg {\\n125:     // These are the default options used when when the\\n126:     // client is started in 'start'. These can be altered\\n127:     // at any time up to after the 'will_start_client'\\n128:     // event is finished processing.\\n129:     public opts: IStartClientOpts = {\\n130:         initialSyncLimit: 20,\\n131:     };\\n132: \\n133:     private matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;\\n134:     private justRegisteredUserId: string | null = null;\\n135: \\n136:     // the credentials used to init the current client object.\\n137:     // used if we tear it down & recreate it with a different store\\n138:     private currentClientCreds: IMatrixClientCreds;\\n139: \\n140:     public get(): MatrixClient {\\n141:         return this.matrixClient;\\n142:     }\\n143: \\n144:     public unset(): void {\\n145:         this.matrixClient = null;\\n146: \\n147:         MatrixActionCreators.stop();\\n148:     }\\n149: \\n150:     public setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void {\\n151:         this.justRegisteredUserId = uid;\\n152:         if (uid) {\\n153:             const registrationTime = Date.now().toString();\\n154:             window.localStorage.setItem(\\\"mx_registration_time\\\", registrationTime);\\n155:         }\\n156:     }\\n157: \\n158:     public currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean {\\n159:         return this.matrixClient && this.matrixClient.credentials.userId === this.justRegisteredUserId;\\n160:     }\\n161: \\n162:     public userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean {\\n163:         if (hours <= 0) {\\n164:             return false;\\n165:         }\\n166: \\n167:         try {\\n168:             const registrationTime = parseInt(window.localStorage.getItem(\\\"mx_registration_time\\\"), 10);\\n169:             const diff = Date.now() - registrationTime;\\n170:             return diff / 36e5 <= hours;\\n171:         } catch (e) {\\n172:             return false;\\n173:         }\\n174:     }\\n175: \\n176:     public userRegisteredAfter(timestamp: Date): boolean {\\n177:         try {\\n178:             const registrationTime = parseInt(window.localStorage.getItem(\\\"mx_registration_time\\\"), 10);\\n179:             return timestamp.getTime() <= registrationTime;\\n180:         } catch (e) {\\n181:             return false;\\n182:         }\\n183:     }\\n184: \\n185:     public replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void {\\n186:         this.currentClientCreds = creds;\\n187:         this.createClient(creds);\\n188:     }\\n189: \\n190:     public async assign(): Promise<any> {\\n191:         for (const dbType of [\\\"indexeddb\\\", \\\"memory\\\"]) {\\n192:             try {\\n193:                 const promise = this.matrixClient.store.startup();\\n194:                 logger.log(\\\"MatrixClientPeg: waiting for MatrixClient store to initialise\\\");\\n195:                 await promise;\\n196:                 break;\\n197:             } catch (err) {\\n198:                 if (dbType === \\\"indexeddb\\\") {\\n199:                     logger.error(\\\"Error starting matrixclient store - falling back to memory store\\\", err);\\n200:                     this.matrixClient.store = new MemoryStore({\\n201:                         localStorage: localStorage,\\n202:                     });\\n203:                 } else {\\n204:                     logger.error(\\\"Failed to start memory store!\\\", err);\\n205:                     throw err;\\n206:                 }\\n207:             }\\n208:         }\\n209: \\n210:         // try to initialise e2e on the new client\\n211:         try {\\n212:             // check that we have a version of the js-sdk which includes initCrypto\\n213:             if (!SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"lowBandwidth\\\") && this.matrixClient.initCrypto) {\\n214:                 await this.matrixClient.initCrypto();\\n215:                 this.matrixClient.setCryptoTrustCrossSignedDevices(\\n216:                     !SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"e2ee.manuallyVerifyAllSessions\\\"),\\n217:                 );\\n218:                 await tryToUnlockSecretStorageWithDehydrationKey(this.matrixClient);\\n219:                 StorageManager.setCryptoInitialised(true);\\n220:             }\\n221:         } catch (e) {\\n222:             if (e && e.name === \\\"InvalidCryptoStoreError\\\") {\\n223:                 // The js-sdk found a crypto DB too new for it to use\\n224:                 Modal.createDialog(CryptoStoreTooNewDialog);\\n225:             }\\n226:             // this can happen for a number of reasons, the most likely being\\n227:             // that the olm library was missing. It's not fatal.\\n228:             logger.warn(\\\"Unable to initialise e2e\\\", e);\\n229:         }\\n230: \\n231:         const opts = utils.deepCopy(this.opts);\\n232:         // the react sdk opts.clientWellKnownPollPeriod = 2 * 60 * 60; // 2 hours\\n236:         opts.experimentalThreadSupport = SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"feature_thread\\\");\\n237: \\n238:         if (SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"feature_sliding_sync\\\")) {\\n239:             const proxyUrl = SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"feature_sliding_sync_proxy_url\\\");\\n240:             if (proxyUrl) {\\n241: }\\n245:             opts.slidingSync = SlidingSyncManager.instance.configure(\\n246:                 this.matrixClient,\\n247:                 proxyUrl || this.matrixClient.baseUrl,\\n248:             );\\n249:             SlidingSyncManager.instance.startSpidering(100, 50); // 100 rooms at a time, 50ms apart\\n250:         }\\n251: \\n252:         // Connect the matrix client to the dispatcher and setting handlers\\n253:         MatrixActionCreators.start(this.matrixClient);\\n254:         MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler.matrixClient = this.matrixClient;\\n255: \\n256:         return opts;\\n257:     }\\n258: \\n259:     public async start(): Promise<any> {\\n260:         const opts = await this.assign();\\n261: \\n262:         logger.log(`MatrixClientPeg: really starting MatrixClient`);\\n263:         await this.get().startClient(opts);\\n264:         logger.log(`MatrixClientPeg: MatrixClient started`);\\n265:     }\\n266: \\n267:     public getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds {\\n268:         let copiedCredentials = this.currentClientCreds;\\n269:         if (this.currentClientCreds?.userId !== this.matrixClient?.credentials?.userId) {\\n270:             // cached credentials belong to a different user - don't use them\\n271:             copiedCredentials = null;\\n272:         }\\n273:         return {\\n274:             // Copy the cached credentials before overriding what we can.\\n275:             ...(copiedCredentials ?? {}),\\n276: \\n277:             homeserverUrl: this.matrixClient.baseUrl,\\n278:             identityServerUrl: this.matrixClient.idBaseUrl,\\n279:             userId: this.matrixClient.credentials.userId,\\n280:             deviceId: this.matrixClient.getDeviceId(),\\n281:             accessToken: this.matrixClient.getAccessToken(),\\n282:             guest: this.matrixClient.isGuest(),\\n283:         };\\n284:     }\\n285: \\n286:     public getHomeserverName(): string {\\n287:         const matches = /^@[^:]+:(.+)$/.exec(this.matrixClient.credentials.userId);\\n288:         if (matches === null || matches.length < 1) {\\n289:             throw new Error(\\\"Failed to derive homeserver name from user ID!\\\");\\n290:         }\\n291:         return matches[1];\\n292:     }\\n293: \\n294:     private namesToRoomName(names: string[], count: number): string | undefined {\\n295:         const countWithoutMe = count - 1;\\n296:         if (!names.length) {\\n297:             return _t(\\\"Empty room\\\");\\n298:         }\\n299:         if (names.length === 1 && countWithoutMe <= 1) {\\n300:             return names[0];\\n301:         }\\n302:     }\\n303: \\n304:     private memberNamesToRoomName(names: string[], count: number): string {\\n305:         const name = this.namesToRoomName(names, count);\\n306:         if (name) return name;\\n307: \\n308:         if (names.length === 2 && count === 2) {\\n309:             return _t(\\\"%(user1)s and %(user2)s\\\", {\\n310:                 user1: names[0],\\n311:                 user2: names[1],\\n312:             });\\n313:         }\\n314:         return _t(\\\"%(user)s and %(count)s others\\\", {\\n315:             user: names[0],\\n316:             count: count - 1,\\n317:         });\\n318:     }\\n319: \\n320:     private inviteeNamesToRoomName(names: string[], count: number): string {\\n321:         const name = this.namesToRoomName(names, count);\\n322:         if (name) return name;\\n323: \\n324:         if (names.length === 2 && count === 2) {\\n325:             return _t(\\\"Inviting %(user1)s and %(user2)s\\\", {\\n326:                 user1: names[0],\\n327:                 user2: names[1],\\n328:             });\\n329:         }\\n330:         return _t(\\\"Inviting %(user)s and %(count)s others\\\", {\\n331:             user: names[0],\\n332:             count: count - 1,\\n333:         });\\n334:     }\\n335: \\n336:     private createClient(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void {\\n337:         const opts: ICreateClientOpts = {\\n338:             baseUrl: creds.homeserverUrl,\\n339:             idBaseUrl: creds.identityServerUrl,\\n340:             accessToken: creds.accessToken,\\n341:             userId: creds.userId,\\n342:             deviceId: creds.deviceId,\\n343:             pickleKey: creds.pickleKey,\\n344:             timelineSupport: true,\\n345:             forceTURN: !SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"webRtcAllowPeerToPeer\\\"),\\n346:             fallbackICEServerAllowed: !!SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"fallbackICEServerAllowed\\\"),\\n347:             // Gather up to 20 ICE candidates when a call arrives: this should be more than we'd\\n348:             // ever normally need, so effectively this should make all the gathering happen when\\n349:             // the call arrives.\\n350:             iceCandidatePoolSize: 20,\\n351:             verificationMethods: [\\n352:                 verificationMethods.SAS,\\n353:                 SHOW_QR_CODE_METHOD,\\n354:                 verificationMethods.RECIPROCATE_QR_CODE,\\n355:             ],\\n356:             identityServer: new IdentityAuthClient(),\\n357:             // These are always installed regardless of the labs flag so that cross-signing features\\n358:             // can toggle on without reloading and also be accessed immediately after login.\\n359:             cryptoCallbacks: { ...crossSigningCallbacks },\\n360:             roomNameGenerator: (_: string, state: RoomNameState) => {\\n361:                 switch (state.type) {\\n362:                     case RoomNameType.Generated:\\n363:                         switch (state.subtype) {\\n364:                             case \\\"Inviting\\\":\\n365:                                 return this.inviteeNamesToRoomName(state.names, state.count);\\n366:                             default:\\n367:                                 return this.memberNamesToRoomName(state.names, state.count);\\n368:                         }\\n369:                     case RoomNameType.EmptyRoom:\\n370:                         if (state.oldName) {\\n371:                             return _t(\\\"Empty room (was %(oldName)s)\\\", {\\n372:                                 oldName: state.oldName,\\n373:                             });\\n374:                         } else {\\n375:                             return _t(\\\"Empty room\\\");\\n376:                         }\\n377:                     default:\\n378:                         return null;\\n379:                 }\\n380:             },\\n381:         };\\n382: \\n383:         if (SecurityCustomisations.getDehydrationKey) {\\n384:             opts.cryptoCallbacks!.getDehydrationKey = SecurityCustomisations.getDehydrationKey;\\n385:         }\\n386: \\n387:         this.matrixClient = createMatrixClient(opts);\\n388: \\n389:         // we're going to add eventlisteners for each matrix event tile, so the\\n390:         // potential number of event listeners is quite high.\\n391:         this.matrixClient.setMaxListeners(500);\\n392: \\n393: pendingEvents: false,\\n398:         });\\n399:         // XXX: what is our initial pagination token?! it somehow needs to be synchronised with /sync.\\n400:         notifTimelineSet.getLiveTimeline().setPaginationToken(\\\"\\\", EventTimeline.BACKWARDS);\\n401:         this.matrixClient.setNotifTimelineSet(notifTimelineSet);\\n402:     }\\n403: }\\n404: \\n405: registrationTime;\n170:             return diff / 36e5 <= hours;\n171:         } catch (e) {\n172:             return false;\n173:         }\n174:     }\n175: \n176:     public userRegisteredAfter(timestamp: Date): boolean {\n177:         try {\n178:             const registrationTime = parseInt(window.localStorage.getItem(\"mx_registration_time\"), 10);\n179:             return timestamp.getTime() <= registrationTime;\n180:         } catch (e) {\n181:             return false;\n182:         }\n183:     }\n184: \n185:     public replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void {\n186:         this.currentClientCreds = creds;\n187:         this.createClient(creds);\n188:     }\n189: \n190:     public async assign(): Promise<any> {\n191:         for (const dbType of [\"indexeddb\", \"memory\"]) {\n192:             try {\n193:                 const promise = this.matrixClient.store.startup();\n194:                 logger.log(\"MatrixClientPeg: waiting for MatrixClient store to initialise\");\n195:                 await promise;\n196:                 break;\n197:             } catch (err) {\n198:                 if (dbType === \"indexeddb\") {\n199:                     logger.error(\"Error starting matrixclient store - { Room } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\";\nimport { Thread } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/thread\";\nimport { MatrixEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\";\nimport { EventType } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/event\";\nimport { M_BEACON } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/beacon\";\n\nimport { MatrixClientPeg } from \"./MatrixClientPeg\";\nimport shouldHideEvent from \"./shouldHideEvent\";\nimport { haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\nimport SettingsStore from \"./settings/SettingsStore\";\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n * count of unread messages\n *\n * @param {Object} ev The event\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n */\nexport function eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    if (ev.getSender() === MatrixClientPeg.get().credentials.userId) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    switch (ev.getType()) {\n        case EventType.RoomMember:\n        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n        case EventType.CallHangup:\n        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n        case M_BEACON.name:\n        case M_BEACON.altName:\n            return false;\n    }\n\n    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    return haveRendererForEvent(ev, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n}\n\n/**\n * Determines whether a single timeline has unread messages after the given read-up-to ID.\n * If readUpToId is null/undefined, considers the timeline unread if it has any relevant events.\n * Does NOT count the last event as unread if it was sent by the current user.\n */\nfunction timelineHasUnread(\n    events: MatrixEvent[],\n    readUpToId: string | null,\n    myUserId: string,\n): boolean {\n    if (!events || events.length === 0) return false;\n\n    // If the last relevant event was sent by the current user, do not consider unread\n    // Find the last event that would trigger unread\n    const lastRelevantEvent = [...events].reverse().find(\n        (ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && (ev.isRedacted() ? false : true),\n    );\n    if (lastRelevantEvent && lastRelevantEvent.getSender() === myUserId) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    for (let i = events.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n        const ev = events[i];\n\n        if (ev.getId() === readUpToId) {\n            // The user has read up to this event - nothing is unread\n            return false;\n        } else if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev)) {\n            // We found an unread message before hitting the read receipt\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Didn't find the read receipt - if there were no relevant events, not unread\n    // If readUpToId was provided but not found, assume unread (false positive better than false negative)\n    return readUpToId !== null && readUpToId !== undefined\n        ? true // receipt exists but points to an event not in our local history - assume unread\n        : events.some((ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev));\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (SettingsStore.getValue(\"feature_sliding_sync\")) {\n        // TODO: https://github.com/vector-im/element-web/issues/23207\n        // Sliding Sync doesn't support unread indicator dots (yet...)\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    const myUserId = MatrixClientPeg.get().getUserId();\n\n    // Check the main room timeline\n    const mainTimelineEvents = room.timeline || [];\n\n    // Get read receipt for main timeline\n    const mainReadUpToId = room.getEventReadUpTo(myUserId);\n\n    // Special case: if the last event on the main timeline was sent by the current user,\n    // don't count it as unread (we can't send read receipts for our own events)\n    const mainTimelineLength = mainTimelineEvents.length;\n    if (\n        mainTimelineLength > 0 &&\n        mainTimelineEvents[mainTimelineLength - 1].getSender() === myUserId\n    ) {\n        // Check if there are any threads with unread messages\n        const threads = room.getThreads ? room.getThreads() : [];\n        for (const thread of threads) {\n            const threadEvents = thread.timeline || [];\n            const threadReadUpToId = room.getEventReadUpTo\n                ? (() => {\n                      // Try to get thread-specific read receipt\n                      try {\n                          return (thread as any).getEventReadUpTo?.(myUserId) ??\n                              room.getEventReadUpTo(myUserId, false);\n                      } catch {\n                          return room.getEventReadUpTo(myUserId);\n                      }\n                  })()\n                : null;\n\n            if (timelineHasUnread(threadEvents, threadReadUpToId, myUserId)) {\n                return true;\n            }\n        }\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    // Check if the main read receipt points to a thread event\n    // In that case, the main timeline may still have unread messages\n    const receiptEvent = mainReadUpToId ? room.findEventById(mainReadUpToId) : null;\n    const receiptIsInThread = receiptEvent?.getThread?.() != null;\n\n    // Check the main room timeline for unread messages\n    // If the receipt is in a thread, use null so we scan the full main timeline\n    const mainTimeline = room.timeline;\n    let mainHasUnread = false;\n\n    if (!receiptIsInThread) {\n        // Normal main timeline check\n        for (let i = mainTimeline.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n            const ev = mainTimeline[i];\n\n            if (ev.getId() === mainReadUpToId) {\n                mainHasUnread = false;\n                break;\n            } else if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev)) {\n                mainHasUnread = true;\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // If we didn't find the read receipt, check if there are events that count\n        if (mainReadUpToId && !mainHasUnread) {\n            // If we didn't hit the receipt, it might be before our local history\n            // In that case, check if there are any counting events\n            const hasCountingEvents = mainTimeline.some(\n                (ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev),\n            );\n            mainHasUnread = hasCountingEvents && !mainTimeline.some((ev) => ev.getId() === mainReadUpToId);\n        } else if (!mainReadUpToId) {\n            // No read receipt at all - check for any events\n            mainHasUnread = mainTimeline.some((ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev));\n        }\n    } else {\n        // Receipt is in a thread - check the main timeline for any unread events\n        // (Since the receipt is thread-specific, all main-timeline events might be unread)\n        mainHasUnread = mainTimeline.some((ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev));\n    }\n\n    if (mainHasUnread) return true;\n\n    // Now check all threads\n    const threads = room.getThreads ? room.getThreads() : [];\n    for (const thread of threads) {\n        const threadTimeline = thread.timeline || [];\n\n        // Get the thread-specific read receipt\n        // Threads track their own read receipts\n        let threadReadUpToId: string | null = null;\n        try {\n            threadReadUpToId = (thread as any).getEventReadUpTo?.(myUserId) ?? null;\n        } catch {\n            threadReadUpToId = null;\n        }\n\n        // If no thread-specific receipt, try the room receipt to see if it's for this thread\n        if (!threadReadUpToId && receiptIsInThread && receiptEvent?.getThread?.()?.id === thread.id) {\n            threadReadUpToId = mainReadUpToId;\n        }\n\n        // Check if the last event in the thread was sent by the current user\n        const lastThreadEvent = threadTimeline[threadTimeline.length - 1];\n        if (lastThreadEvent?.getSender() === myUserId) {\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        for (let i = threadTimeline.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n            const ev = threadTimeline[i];\n\n            if (ev.getId() === threadReadUpToId) {\n                break; // Thread is read up to here\n            } else if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev)) {\n                return true; // Found unread in thread\n            }\n        }\n\n        // If we have no thread receipt and there are events that count, it's unread\n        if (!threadReadUpToId && threadTimeline.some((ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev))) {\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    return false;\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":302,"cache_read_input_tokens":114606,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":302,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":3,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af6935b8-08ac-4a02-9e60-957e650986f2","uuid":"79749191-2fc3-40af-b37b-88d08f7918e7"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_016tewwShwnASYGzdu2U52Cc","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_018FSpQqNtT4DDMkfbKPdDeC","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /app/src/Unread.ts << 'ENDOFFILE'\n/*\nCopyright 2015 - 2022 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\n\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\nimport { Room } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\";\nimport { MatrixEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\";\nimport { EventType } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/event\";\nimport { M_BEACON } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/beacon\";\n\nimport { MatrixClientPeg } from \"./MatrixClientPeg\";\nimport shouldHideEvent from \"./shouldHideEvent\";\nimport { haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\nimport SettingsStore from \"./settings/SettingsStore\";\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n * count of unread messages\n *\n * @param {Object} ev The event\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n */\nexport function eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    if (ev.getSender() === MatrixClientPeg.get().credentials.userId) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    switch (ev.getType()) {\n        case EventType.RoomMember:\n        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n        case EventType.CallHangup:\n        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n        case M_BEACON.name:\n        case M_BEACON.altName:\n            return false;\n    }\n\n    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    return haveRendererForEvent(ev, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n}\n\n/**\n * Checks whether a single timeline (room or thread) has unread messages.\n * Returns true if there is at least one event that triggers unread count\n * after the user's read-up-to point.\n *\n * Correctly handles:\n * - The last event being from the current user (not unread)\n * - Redacted events and events without renderers (ignored)\n * - Missing read receipts (unread if any relevant events exist)\n */\nfunction timelineHasUnread(events: MatrixEvent[], readUpToId: string | null | undefined, myUserId: string): boolean {\n    if (!events || events.length === 0) return false;\n\n    // If the last relevant non-hidden event was sent by the current user, not unread\n    for (let i = events.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n        const ev = events[i];\n        if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev)) {\n            // This is the last \"meaningful\" event. If it's ours, not unread.\n            break;\n        }\n        if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && ev.getSender() === myUserId) {\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Check if last event was sent by current user (considering hidden events)\n    // We need to check more carefully\n    const lastEvent = events[events.length - 1];\n    if (lastEvent && lastEvent.getSender() === myUserId) {\n        // The very last event is ours - don't count as unread for this timeline\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    // Loop through events most-recent-first looking for unread content\n    for (let i = events.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n        const ev = events[i];\n\n        if (ev.getId() === readUpToId) {\n            // Read up to here - nothing after is unread\n            return false;\n        } else if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev)) {\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // We went through all events without hitting the read receipt\n    if (!readUpToId) {\n        // No read receipt at all - unread if any relevant events\n        return events.some((ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev));\n    }\n\n    // Had a read receipt but didn't find it in our local history\n    // Assume unread (false positive > false negative)\n    return true;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (SettingsStore.getValue(\"feature_sliding_sync\")) {\n        // TODO: https://github.com/vector-im/element-web/issues/23207\n        // Sliding Sync doesn't support unread indicator dots (yet...)\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    const myUserId = MatrixClientPeg.get().getUserId();\n\n    // Get the room-level read receipt\n    const mainReadUpToId = room.getEventReadUpTo(myUserId);\n\n    // Check if the receipt event is part of a thread\n    const receiptEvent = mainReadUpToId ? room.findEventById(mainReadUpToId) : null;\n    const receiptIsInThread = !!receiptEvent?.getThread?.();\n\n    // Check main room timeline\n    const mainTimeline = room.timeline || [];\n\n    // If the last event in the main timeline was sent by us, don't consider main timeline unread\n    const mainTimelineLastSender = mainTimeline.length > 0 ? mainTimeline[mainTimeline.length - 1].getSender() : null;\n    let mainHasUnread = false;\n\n    if (mainTimelineLastSender === myUserId) {\n        mainHasUnread = false;\n    } else if (receiptIsInThread) {\n        // Receipt points to a thread event - scan entire main timeline for unread\n        mainHasUnread = mainTimeline.some((ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev));\n    } else {\n        // Normal main timeline check\n        for (let i = mainTimeline.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n            const ev = mainTimeline[i];\n            if (ev.getId() === mainReadUpToId) {\n                mainHasUnread = false;\n                break;\n            } else if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev)) {\n                mainHasUnread = true;\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (!mainReadUpToId) {\n            // No read receipt - unread if any events count\n            mainHasUnread = mainTimeline.some((ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev));\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (mainHasUnread) return true;\n\n    // Now check all threads\n    const threads = room.getThreads ? room.getThreads() : [];\n    for (const thread of threads) {\n        const threadTimeline = thread.timeline || [];\n        if (threadTimeline.length === 0) continue;\n\n        // Check if last event in thread was sent by current user\n        const lastThreadEvent = threadTimeline[threadTimeline.length - 1];\n        if (lastThreadEvent?.getSender() === myUserId) {\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        // Get thread-specific read receipt\n        let threadReadUpToId: string | null = null;\n        try {\n            // Threads may have their own getEventReadUpTo (via EventTimelineSet)\n            if (typeof (thread as any).getEventReadUpTo === \"function\") {\n                threadReadUpToId = (thread as any).getEventReadUpTo(myUserId) ?? null;\n            }\n        } catch {\n            threadReadUpToId = null;\n        }\n\n        // If the room-level receipt is for this thread, use it\n        if (!threadReadUpToId && receiptIsInThread && receiptEvent?.getThread?.()?.id === thread.id) {\n            threadReadUpToId = mainReadUpToId;\n        }\n\n        if (timelineHasUnread(threadTimeline, threadReadUpToId, myUserId)) {\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    return false;\n}\nENDOFFILE\necho \"done\"","description":"Write src/Unread.ts with the fixed implementation"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":104,"cache_read_input_tokens":117586,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":104,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af6935b8-08ac-4a02-9e60-957e650986f2","uuid":"76a24c4a-1d6a-466a-854c-280dfcf6c43e"}

expect(haveRendererForEvent).not.toHaveBeenCalled();\n    });\n\n    it(\"returns false for an event without a renderer\", () => {\n        mocked(haveRendererForEvent).mockReturnValue(false);\n {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JTPxNTcMdA4QjcpzZWXnPm","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/*\n     2→Copyright 2015 - 2022 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n     3→\n     4→Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n     5→you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n     6→You may obtain a copy of the distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n    12→WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n    13→See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n    14→limitations under the License.\n    15→*/\n    16→\n    17→import { Room } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\";\n    18→import { MatrixEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\";\n    19→import { EventType } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/event\";\n    20→import { M_BEACON } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/beacon\";\n    21→\n    22→import { MatrixClientPeg } from \"./MatrixClientPeg\";\n    23→import shouldHideEvent from \"./shouldHideEvent\";\n    24→import { haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\n    25→import SettingsStore from \"./settings/SettingsStore\";\n    26→\n    27→/**\n    28→ * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n    29→ * count of unread messages\n    30→ *\n    31→ * @param {Object} ev The event\n    32→ * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n    33→ */\n    34→export function eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    35→    if (ev.getSender() === MatrixClientPeg.get().credentials.userId) {\n    36→        return false;\n    37→    }\n    38→\n    39→    switch (ev.getType()) {\n    40→        case EventType.RoomMember:\n    41→        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n    42→        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n    43→        case EventType.CallHangup:\n    44→        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n    45→        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n    46→        case M_BEACON.name:\n    47→        case M_BEACON.altName:\n    48→            return false;\n    49→    }\n    50→\n    51→    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    52→    return haveRendererForEvent(ev, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n    53→}\n    54→\n    55→/**\n    56→ * Checks whether a single timeline (room or thread) has unread messages.\n    57→ * Returns true if there is at least one event that triggers unread count\n    58→ * after the user's read-up-to point.\n    59→ *\n    60→ * Correctly handles:\n    61→ * - The last event being from the current user (not unread)\n    62→ * - Redacted events and events without renderers (ignored)\n    63→ * - Missing read receipts (unread if any relevant events exist)\n    64→ */\n    65→function timelineHasUnread(events: MatrixEvent[], readUpToId: string | null | undefined, myUserId: string): boolean {\n    66→    if (!events || events.length === 0) return false;\n    67→\n    68→    // If the last relevant non-hidden event was sent by the current user, not unread\n    69→    for (let i = events.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n    70→        const ev = events[i];\n    71→        if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev)) {\n    72→            // This is the last \"meaningful\" event. If it's ours, not unread.\n    73→            break;\n    74→        }\n    75→        if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && ev.getSender() === myUserId) {\n    76→            return false;\n    77→        }\n    78→    }\n    79→\n    80→    // Check if last event was sent by current user (considering hidden events)\n    81→    // We need to check more carefully\n    82→    const lastEvent = events[events.length - 1];\n    83→    if (lastEvent && lastEvent.getSender() === myUserId) {\n    84→        // The very last event is ours - don't count as unread for this timeline\n    85→        return false;\n    86→    }\n    87→\n    88→    // Loop through events most-recent-first looking for unread content\n    89→    for (let i = events.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n    90→        const ev = events[i];\n    91→\n    92→        if (ev.getId() === readUpToId) {\n    93→            // Read up to here - nothing after is unread\n    94→            return false;\n    95→        } else if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev)) {\n    96→            return true;\n    97→        }\n    98→    }\n    99→\n   100→    // We went through all events without hitting the read receipt\n   101→    if (!readUpToId) {\n   102→        // No read receipt at all - { Room } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\";\nimport { MatrixEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\";\nimport { EventType } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/event\";\nimport { M_BEACON } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/beacon\";\n\nimport { MatrixClientPeg } from \"./MatrixClientPeg\";\nimport shouldHideEvent from \"./shouldHideEvent\";\nimport { haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\nimport SettingsStore from \"./settings/SettingsStore\";\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n * count of unread messages\n *\n * @param {Object} ev The event\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n */\nexport function eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    if (ev.getSender() === MatrixClientPeg.get().credentials.userId) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    switch (ev.getType()) {\n        case EventType.RoomMember:\n        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n        case EventType.CallHangup:\n        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n        case M_BEACON.name:\n        case M_BEACON.altName:\n            return false;\n    }\n\n    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    return haveRendererForEvent(ev, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n}\n\n/**\n * Checks whether a single timeline (room or thread) has unread messages.\n * Returns true if there is at least one event that triggers unread count\n * after the user's read-up-to point.\n *\n * Correctly handles:\n * - The last event being from the current user (not unread)\n * - Redacted events and events without renderers (ignored)\n * - Missing read receipts (unread if any relevant events exist)\n */\nfunction timelineHasUnread(events: MatrixEvent[], readUpToId: string | null | undefined, myUserId: string): boolean {\n    if (!events || events.length === 0) return false;\n\n    // If the last relevant non-hidden event was sent by the current user, not unread\n    for (let i = events.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n        const ev = events[i];\n        if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev)) {\n            // This is the last \"meaningful\" event. If it's ours, not unread.\n            break;\n        }\n        if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && ev.getSender() === myUserId) {\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Check if last event was sent by current user (considering hidden events)\n    // We need to check more carefully\n    const lastEvent = events[events.length - 1];\n    if (lastEvent && lastEvent.getSender() === myUserId) {\n        // The very last event is ours - don't count as unread for this timeline\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    // Loop through events most-recent-first looking for unread content\n    for (let i = events.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n        const ev = events[i];\n\n        if (ev.getId() === readUpToId) {\n            // Read up to here - nothing after is unread\n            return false;\n        } else if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev)) {\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // We went through all events without hitting the read receipt\n    if (!readUpToId) {\n        // No read receipt at all - unread if any relevant events\n        return events.some((ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev));\n    }\n\n    // Had a read receipt but didn't find it in our local history\n    // Assume unread (false positive > false negative)\n    return true;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (SettingsStore.getValue(\"feature_sliding_sync\")) {\n        // TODO: https://github.com/vector-im/element-web/issues/23207\n        // Sliding Sync doesn't support unread indicator dots (yet...)\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    const myUserId = MatrixClientPeg.get().getUserId();\n\n    // Get the room-level read receipt\n    const mainReadUpToId = room.getEventReadUpTo(myUserId);\n\n    // Check if the receipt event is part of a thread\n    const receiptEvent = mainReadUpToId ? room.findEventById(mainReadUpToId) : null;\n    const receiptIsInThread = !!receiptEvent?.getThread?.();\n\n    // Check main room timeline\n    const mainTimeline = room.timeline || [];\n\n    // If the last event in the main timeline was sent by us, don't consider main timeline unread\n    const mainTimelineLastSender = mainTimeline.length > 0 ? mainTimeline[mainTimeline.length - 1].getSender() : null;\n    let mainHasUnread = false;\n\n    if (mainTimelineLastSender === myUserId) {\n        mainHasUnread = false;\n    } else if (receiptIsInThread) {\n        // Receipt points to a thread event - scan entire main timeline for unread\n        mainHasUnread = mainTimeline.some((ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev));\n    } else {\n        // Normal main timeline check\n        for (let i = mainTimeline.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n            const ev = mainTimeline[i];\n            if (ev.getId() === mainReadUpToId) {\n                mainHasUnread = false;\n                break;\n            } else if (!shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev)) {\n                mainHasUnread = true;\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (!mainReadUpToId) {\n            // No read receipt - unread if any events count\n            mainHasUnread = mainTimeline.some((ev) => !shouldHideEvent(ev) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(ev));\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (mainHasUnread) return true;\n\n    // Now check all threads\n    const threads = room.getThreads ? room.getThreads() : [];\n    for (const thread of threads) {\n        const threadTimeline = thread.timeline || [];\n        if (threadTimeline.length === 0) continue;\n\n        // Check if last event in thread was sent by current user\n        const lastThreadEvent = threadTimeline[threadTimeline.length - 1];\n        if (lastThreadEvent?.getSender() === myUserId) {\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        // Get thread-specific read receipt\n        let threadReadUpToId: string | null = null;\n        try {\n            // Threads may have their own getEventReadUpTo (via EventTimelineSet)\n            if (typeof (thread as any).getEventReadUpTo === \"function\") {\n                threadReadUpToId = (thread as any).getEventReadUpTo(myUserId) ?? null;\n            }\n        } catch {\n            threadReadUpToId = null;\n        }\n\n        // If the room-level receipt is for this thread, use it\n        if (!threadReadUpToId && receiptIsInThread && receiptEvent?.getThread?.()?.id === thread.id) {\n            threadReadUpToId = mainReadUpToId;\n        }\n\n        if (timelineHasUnread(threadTimeline, threadReadUpToId, myUserId)) {\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    return false;\n}\n","numLines":195,"startLine":1,"totalLines":195}}}

Here's a summary of what I implemented:\n\n## Summary\n\n### Problem\nThe `doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages()` function in `src/Unread.ts` had several bugs:\n1. When `feature_thread` was enabled, it skipped the check for the last message being sent by the current user\n2. It returned `false` if the read receipt pointed to a thread event, without actually checking the thread timeline\n3. It only looked at `room.timeline` and completely ignored thread timelines\n\n### Fix: `src/Unread.ts`\nRewrote `doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages()` to:\n- **Check main timeline properly**: If last event is from current user → not unread. If receipt points to a thread event → scan all main timeline events for unread. Otherwise, normal receipt-based scan.\n- **Check all threads**: For each thread, check if the last event was from the current user, get the thread-specific read receipt via `thread.getEventReadUpTo()`, and scan the thread timeline for unread events.\n- **Extracted `timelineHasUnread()`** helper for clean thread timeline checking with proper handling of read receipts, redacted events, and current-user events.\n\n### Key behaviors verified by tests:\n- Redacted events and events without renderers are ignored ✓\n- Events from excluded types (m.room.member, m.call.answer, etc.) are ignored ✓\n- Last event sent by current user → not unread (both main and thread timelines) ✓  \n- Thread-scoped read receipts are honored ✓\n- Multiple threads evaluated individually ✓\n- No receipts → unread if any relevant events exist ✓\n- Receipt at latest → read; receipt at earlier → unread ✓\n- Receipt in thread → main timeline still checked independently ✓"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2273,"cache_read_input_tokens":154551,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2273,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af6935b8-08ac-4a02-9e60-957e650986f2","uuid":"ba35db9a-e429-4132-a6be-7bf5ba2629d6"}
